dashboards.name: Network Performance Dashboard
dashboards.description: Real-time network performance metrics across Myanmar regions

tiles.title: Network Coverage
tiles.query: NetworkMetrics_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(5m) | summarize avg(CoveragePercentage_d) by Region_s

tiles.title: Speed Test Results
tiles.query: SpeedTestResults_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(1h) | summarize avg(DownloadSpeed_d), avg(UploadSpeed_d) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)

tiles.title: Regional Performance
tiles.query: NetworkMetrics_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(15m) | summarize avg(CoveragePercentage_d), avg(DownloadSpeed_d) by Region_s, Latitude_d, Longitude_d

dashboards.name: Device Enrollment Dashboard
dashboards.description: eSIM device enrollment and lifecycle management metrics

tiles.title: Active eSIM Profiles
tiles.query: DeviceEnrollment_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(1d) | summarize count() by Status_s

tiles.title: Device Types
tiles.query: DeviceEnrollment_CL | where Status_s == 'Active' | summarize count() by DeviceType_s

dashboards.name: Compliance Metrics Dashboard
dashboards.description: Security and compliance monitoring across all systems
